title: wolfhsm tests: crypto (tests 8-17)
description: Integration tests for all crypto operations. Independent oracles required — never verify wolfHSM output with wolfHSM. Tests: ecc_keygen_sign_verify (p256 crate verifies ECDSA sig), ecc_ecdh (two HSM keys derive same secret), ecc_export_der (spki crate parses SubjectPublicKeyInfo), ed25519_sign_verify (ed25519-dalek verifies), curve25519_dh (two keys -> same secret), rsa_sign_verify (rsa crate verifies), mldsa_sign_verify (feature=mldsa, independent ML-DSA ref impl), aes_gcm_roundtrip (encrypt then decrypt, compare plaintext), sha256_known_vector (compare to sha2 crate), cmac_known_vector (NIST CMAC test vector).
